name: openweight
description: Open data format for strength training

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:sdk && npm run test:converters && npm run test:cli
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@openweight/sdk && npm run build --workspace=@openweight/converters && npm run build --workspace=@openweight/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@openweight/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace=@openweight/converters && npm run typecheck --workspace=@openweight/cli
